description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and modern design. It has a prominent cylindrical barrel with a visible pump-action fore-end, equipped with a ribbed grip for secure handling. The receiver is fitted with a Picatinny rail system on top, allowing for the attachment of various accessories such as sights or scopes. The stock is an adjustable, collapsible type with a textured buttplate and ergonomic pistol grip, enhancing user comfort and control. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a rugged and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, matte black tactical shotgun with a pump-action fore-end, adjustable stock, and accessory rail system. It features a detachable magazine and ergonomic grip for enhanced control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, pump grip, and the alignment of the barrel and rail system.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, including the adjustable stock, pistol grip, magazine, and accessory rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the buttstock, pistol grip, and the symmetry of the shotgun's components.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other side of the adjustable stock, magazine, and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and a cylindrical profile
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with integrated finger grooves and reinforced edges
